instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `ensure-type` that evaluates an expression once, checks that its value has the given type using `check-type`, and returns the value. Use gensym to avoid recomputing the expression.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (GET-X)))
            (CHECK-TYPE #:G1 INTEGER)
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (GET-X)))
            (CHECK-TYPE #:G112 INTEGER)
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
